bsb_config_copies.forward_yaml_content:
name: No plasticity (forward)
simulations:
  basal_activity:
    connection_models:
      parallel_fiber_to_purkinje_plus:
        synapse:
          Aplus: 0.0002
          Aminus: -0.0001
      parallel_fiber_to_stellate:
        synapse:
          Aplus: 0
          Aminus: 0
      parallel_fiber_to_basket:
        synapse:
          Aplus: 0
          Aminus: 0
      parallel_fiber_to_purkinje_minus:
        synapse:
          Aplus: 0
          Aminus: 0

$import:
  ref: ./microzones_complete_nest.yaml#/
  values:
  - packages
  - storage
  - network
  - regions
  - partitions
  - morphologies
  - cell_types
  - placement
  - connectivity
  # - after_connectivity
  - simulations
  # - components
bsb_config_copies.inverse_yaml_content:
name: No plasticity (inverse)
simulations:
  basal_activity:
    connection_models:
      parallel_fiber_to_purkinje_plus:
        synapse:
          Aplus: 0.0002
          Aminus: -0.0001
      parallel_fiber_to_stellate:
        synapse:
          Aplus: 0
          Aminus: 0
      parallel_fiber_to_basket:
        synapse:
          Aplus: 0
          Aminus: 0
      parallel_fiber_to_purkinje_minus:
        synapse:
          Aplus: 0
          Aminus: 0

$import:
  ref: ./microzones_complete_nest.yaml#/
  values:
  - packages
  - storage
  - network
  - regions
  - partitions
  - morphologies
  - cell_types
  - placement
  - connectivity
  # - after_connectivity
  - simulations
  # - components
bsb_config_copies.base_yaml_content:
name: DBBS Mouse cerebellum w/ DCN and IO NEST basal activity and mf stimulus w/ microzones
storage:
  root: /sim/controller/fake_storage.hdf5
# packages:
#   - bsb-nest~=4.2
# components:
#   - cerebellum/nest_models/build_models.py
simulations:
  basal_activity:
    simulator: nest
    resolution: 0.1
    duration: 50
    modules: # - custom_stdp_module
    seed: 1234
    cell_models:
      mossy_fibers:
        model: parrot_neuron
      glomerulus:
        model: parrot_neuron
      granule_cell:
        model: eglif_cond_alpha_multisyn
        constants:
          t_ref: 1.5
          V_min: -150
          C_m: 7
          V_th: -41
          V_reset: -70
          E_L: -62
          I_e: -0.888
          V_m: -62
          lambda_0: 1.0
          tau_V: 0.3
          tau_m: 24.15
          k_adap: 0.022
          k_1: 0.311
          k_2: 0.041407868
          A1: 0.01
          A2: -0.94
          tau_syn1: 5.8
          tau_syn2: 13.61
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
      golgi_cell:
        model: eglif_cond_alpha_multisyn
        constants:
          t_ref: 2
          C_m: 145
          V_th: -55
          V_reset: -75
          E_L: -62
          V_min: -150
          V_m: -60 #-62.0
          lambda_0: 0.15 #1.0
          tau_V: 0.09 #0.4
          tau_m: 44
          I_e: 16.214
          k_adap: 0.217
          k_1: 0.031
          k_2: 0.023
          A1: 259.988
          A2: 178.01
          tau_syn1: 0.23
          tau_syn2: 10
          tau_syn3: 0.5
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
          E_rev3: 0
      basket_cell:
        model: eglif_mli
        constants:
          t_ref: 1.59
          C_m: 14.6
          V_th: -53
          V_reset: -78
          E_L: -68
          V_m: -60 #-68.0
          lambda_0: 1.8
          tau_V: 1 #1.1
          tau_m: 9.125
          I_e: 3.711
          kadap: 2.025
          k1: 1.887
          k2: 1.096
          A1: 5.953
          A2: 5.863
          tau_syn1: 0.64
          tau_syn2: 2
          tau_syn3: 1.2
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
          E_rev3: 0
      stellate_cell:
        model: eglif_mli
        constants:
          t_ref: 1.59
          C_m: 14.6
          V_th: -53
          V_reset: -78
          E_L: -68
          V_m: -60 #-68.0
          lambda_0: 1.8
          tau_V: 1 #1.1
          tau_m: 9.125
          I_e: 3.711
          kadap: 2.025
          k1: 1.887
          k2: 1.096
          A1: 5.953
          A2: 5.863
          tau_syn1: 0.64
          tau_syn2: 2
          tau_syn3: 1.2
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
          E_rev3: 0
      purkinje_cell_plus:
        model: eglif_pc_nestml
        constants:
          t_ref: 0.5
          Vmin: -350
          C_m: 334
          V_th: -43
          V_reset: -69
          E_L: -59
          V_m: -59
          lambda_0: 4 #0.001
          tau_V: 3.5 #0.5
          tau_m: 47
          I_e: 700 #742.534
          kadap: 1.491
          k1: 0.195
          k2: 0.041
          A1: 157.622
          A2: 172.622
          tau_syn1: 1.1
          tau_syn2: 2.8
          tau_syn3: 0.4
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
          E_rev3: 0
      purkinje_cell_minus:
        model: eglif_pc_nestml
        constants:
          t_ref: 0.5
          Vmin: -350
          C_m: 334
          V_th: -43
          V_reset: -69
          E_L: -59
          V_m: -59
          lambda_0: 4 #0.001
          tau_V: 3.5 #0.5
          tau_m: 47
          I_e: 700 #742.543
          kadap: 1.491
          k1: 0.195
          k2: 0.041
          A1: 157.622
          A2: 172.622
          tau_syn1: 1.1
          tau_syn2: 2.8
          tau_syn3: 0.4
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
          E_rev3: 0
      dcn_p_plus:
        model: eglif_cond_alpha_multisyn
        constants:
          t_ref: 1.5
          C_m: 142
          V_th: -36
          V_reset: -55
          E_L: -45
          I_e: 75.385 #150
          V_m: -45
          lambda_0: 3 #1. # 0.001
          tau_V: 3 #0.3   # 0.5
          tau_m: 33
          k_adap: 0.408
          k_1: 0.697
          k_2: 0.047
          A1: 13.857
          A2: 3.477
          tau_syn1: 1.0
          tau_syn2: 0.7
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
      dcn_p_minus:
        model: eglif_cond_alpha_multisyn
        constants:
          t_ref: 1.5
          C_m: 142
          V_th: -36
          V_reset: -55
          E_L: -45
          I_e: 75.385 #150
          V_m: -45
          lambda_0: 3 #1. # 0.001
          tau_V: 3 #0.3   # 0.5
          tau_m: 33
          k_adap: 0.408
          k_1: 0.697
          k_2: 0.047
          A1: 13.857
          A2: 3.477
          tau_syn1: 1.0
          tau_syn2: 0.7
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
      dcn_i_plus:
        model: eglif_cond_alpha_multisyn
        constants:
          t_ref: 3
          C_m: 56
          V_th: -39
          V_reset: -55
          E_L: -40
          I_e: 2.384 #10.
          V_m: -40
          lambda_0: 0.9 #1. # 0.001
          tau_V: 1 #0.3  # 0.5
          tau_m: 56
          k_adap: 0.079
          k_1: 0.041
          k_2: 0.044
          A1: 176.358
          A2: 176.358
          tau_syn1: 3.64
          tau_syn2: 1.14
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
      dcn_i_minus:
        model: eglif_cond_alpha_multisyn
        constants:
          t_ref: 3
          C_m: 56
          V_th: -39
          V_reset: -55
          E_L: -40
          I_e: 2.384 #10.
          V_m: -40
          lambda_0: 0.9 #1. # 0.001
          tau_V: 1 #0.3  # 0.5
          tau_m: 56
          k_adap: 0.079
          k_1: 0.041
          k_2: 0.044
          A1: 176.358
          A2: 176.358
          tau_syn1: 3.64
          tau_syn2: 1.14
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
      io_plus:
        model: eglif_io_nestml
        constants:
          t_ref: 1
          C_m: 189
          V_th: -35
          V_reset: -45
          E_L: -45
          I_e: -18.101
          V_m: -45
          lambda_0: 1.2
          tau_V: 0.8
          tau_m: 11
          kadap: 1.928
          k1: 0.191
          k2: 0.091
          A1: 1810.923
          A2: 1358.197
          tau_syn1: 1
          tau_syn2: 60
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
      io_minus:
        model: eglif_io_nestml
        constants:
          t_ref: 1
          C_m: 189
          V_th: -35
          V_reset: -45
          E_L: -45
          I_e: -18.101
          V_m: -45
          lambda_0: 1.2
          tau_V: 0.8
          tau_m: 11
          kadap: 1.928
          k1: 0.191
          k2: 0.091
          A1: 1810.923
          A2: 1358.197
          tau_syn1: 1
          tau_syn2: 60
          E_rev1: 0
          E_rev2: -80
    connection_models:
      mossy_fibers_to_glomerulus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 1
          delay: 1
      glomerulus_to_granule:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.23
          delay: 1
          receptor_type: 1
      glomerulus_to_golgi:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.24
          delay: 1
          receptor_type: 1
      golgi_to_glomerulus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.24
          delay: 2
          receptor_type: 2
      golgi_to_golgi:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.007
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 2
      ascending_axon_to_golgi:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.82
          delay: 2
          receptor_type: 3
      parallel_fiber_to_golgi:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.05
          delay: 5
          receptor_type: 3
      parallel_fiber_to_purkinje_plus:
        synapse:
          model: stdp_synapse_sinexp
          weight: 0.14
          delay: 5
          receptor_type: 1
      ascending_axon_to_purkinje_plus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.41
          delay: 2
          receptor_type: 1
      parallel_fiber_to_stellate:
        synapse:
          model: stdp_synapse_alpha
          weight: 0.08 #0.18
          delay: 5
          Aplus: 0.0002
          Aminus: -0.0001 #-0.00008
          receptor_type: 1
      stellate_to_stellate:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.005
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 2
      stellate_to_purkinje_plus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.17 #1.64
          delay: 5
          receptor_type: 2
      parallel_fiber_to_basket:
        synapse:
          model: stdp_synapse_alpha
          weight: 0.06 #0.1
          delay: 5
          Aplus: 0.00005 #0.0001
          Aminus: -0.00002
          receptor_type: 1
      basket_to_basket:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.006
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 2
      basket_to_purkinje_plus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.8 #0.44
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 2
      ascending_axon_to_purkinje_minus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.41
          delay: 2
          receptor_type: 1
      parallel_fiber_to_purkinje_minus:
        synapse:
          model: stdp_synapse_sinexp
          weight: 0.14
          delay: 5
          receptor_type: 1
      stellate_to_purkinje_minus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.17 #1.64
          delay: 5
          receptor_type: 2
      basket_to_purkinje_minus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.8 #0.44
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 2
      mossy_fibers_to_dcn_p_plus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.25 # 0.05
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 1
      mossy_fibers_to_dcn_p_minus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.25 # 0.05
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 1
      purkinje_to_dcn_p_plus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.35 #3. # 0.4
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 2
      purkinje_to_dcn_p_minus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.35 #3. # 0.4
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 2
      purkinje_to_dcn_i_plus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.02 #0.4 # 0.12
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 2
      purkinje_to_dcn_i_minus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.02 #0.4 # 0.12
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 2
      io_to_purkinje_plus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 800 #300 # 50
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 5
      io_to_purkinje_minus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 800 #300 # 50
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 5
      io_to_mli_plus_io_plus_to_basket_cell:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 5 # 2.5
          delay: 40
          receptor_type: 3
      io_to_mli_plus_io_plus_to_stellate_cell:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 5 # 2.5
          delay: 40
          receptor_type: 3
      io_to_mli_minus_io_minus_to_basket_cell:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 5 # 2.5
          delay: 40
          receptor_type: 3
      io_to_mli_minus_io_minus_to_stellate_cell:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 5 # 2.5
          delay: 40
          receptor_type: 3
      io_to_dcn_p_plus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.4 #0.5 # 2.5
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 1
      io_to_dcn_p_minus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.4 #0.5 # 2.5
          delay: 4
          receptor_type: 1
      io_to_dcn_i_plus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.25 #0.5 # 0.1
          delay: 5
          receptor_type: 1
      io_to_dcn_i_minus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.25 #0.5 # 0.1
          delay: 5
          receptor_type: 1
      dcn_i_to_io_plus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.45 # 0.75
          delay: 25
          receptor_type: 2
      dcn_i_to_io_minus:
        synapse:
          model: static_synapse
          weight: 0.45 # 0.75
          delay: 25
          receptor_type: 2
    devices:
      background_noise:
        device: poisson_generator
        rate: 4
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - mossy_fibers
        weight: 1
        delay: 0.1
      mossy_fibers_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - mossy_fibers
      glomerulus_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - glomerulus
      granule_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - granule_cell
      golgi_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - golgi_cell
      basket_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - basket_cell
      stellate_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - stellate_cell
      purkinje_cell_plus_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - purkinje_cell_plus
      purkinje_cell_minus_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - purkinje_cell_minus
      dcn_p_plus_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - dcn_p_plus
      dcn_p_minus_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - dcn_p_minus
      dcn_i_plus_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - dcn_i_plus
      dcn_i_minus_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - dcn_i_minus
      io_plus_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - io_plus
      io_minus_record:
        device: spike_recorder
        delay: 0.1
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - io_minus
  mf_cf_stimulus:
    devices:
      mf_stimulus_1:
        device: poisson_generator
        rate: 40
        start: 500
        stop: 760
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - mossy_fibers
        weight: 1
        delay: 0.1
      mf_stimulus_2:
        device: poisson_generator
        rate: 40
        start: 1500
        stop: 1760
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - mossy_fibers
        weight: 1
        delay: 0.1
      cf_stimulus_plus:
        device: poisson_generator
        rate: 500
        start: 750
        stop: 760
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - io_plus
        receptor_type: 1
        weight: 55
        delay: 0.1
      cf_stimulus_minus:
        device: poisson_generator
        rate: 500
        start: 750
        stop: 760
        targetting:
          strategy: cell_model
          cell_models:
          - io_minus
        receptor_type: 1
        weight: 55
        delay: 0.1
    $import:
      ref: "#/simulations/basal_activity"
      values:
      - simulator
      - resolution
      - duration
      - modules
      - seed
      - cell_models
      - connection_models
      - devices
$import:
  ref: /sim/cerebellum/configurations/mouse/dcn-io/microzones_complete.yaml#/
  values:
  - packages
  - storage
  - network
  - regions
  - partitions
  - morphologies
  - cell_types
  - placement
  - connectivity
